summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of LeadixAI SaaS application. All major features and pages working correctly in demo mode with mock data.

integration_issues.issue: Session expires quickly requiring re-login between page navigations

passed_tests: Landing page with all sections (navbar, hero, trust strip, problem/solution, features, how it works, demo preview, testimonials, pricing preview, final CTA, footer)
Pricing page with 3 plan cards, feature comparison table, FAQ accordion functionality
Login page with email/password form, password toggle, demo authentication
Signup page with name/email/password form, password toggle, dashboard redirect
Dashboard home with action center, metrics cards, recent activity, quick actions
Sidebar navigation between all dashboard pages
My Funnels page showing funnel cards and empty state handling
Leads CRM with search functionality and CSV export
Analytics page with metrics cards, charts, and event logs
Settings page with all 3 tabs (profile, billing, security) and forms
Public Social Proof page with metrics, testimonials, case studies, before/after sections
